name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something for a future release
labels: enhancement
---

## What are you trying to do?

<!-- Describe the goal, not the feature. "I want to do X" is more useful than "add a button for X." -->

## How are you doing it today?

<!-- What is your current workaround, if any? -->

## What would the ideal solution look like?

<!-- Describe what you have in mind. Rough ideas are fine, no need for a full spec. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, examples, links, or anything else that helps explain the request. -->
